--- title: molgraph keywords: fastai sidebar: home_sidebar summary: "Collection of tools to train graph neural networks." description: "Collection of tools to train graph neural networks." nb_path: "index.ipynb" ---
{% raw %}
{% endraw %}

Requirements

  1. git clone https://github.com/chembl/ChEMBL_Structure_Pipeline.git pip install ./ChEMBL_Structure_Pipeline

  2. conda install -c conda-forge rdkit or pip install rdkit-pypi

  3. pip install git+https://github.com/bp-kelley/descriptastorus

  4. pip install fastai
